---
name: incident-command-evidence
description: Use for incident readiness, classification, command support, logs, evidence preservation, manifests, and custody planning.
---

# Incident Command Evidence

Mission/scope: static incident governance and evidence planning. Inputs: report, criteria, scope, evidence references, authority constraints. Preconditions: no live access; owners by role. Output: readiness plan, declaration support, role matrix, logs, evidence plan, manifest, custody record. Allowed tools/permissions: repository context only, read-only. Dependencies: command, legal, privacy, technical, business, safety, evidence owners. Invoke for readiness, declaration support, command, evidence. Delegate forensic/recovery and assurance. Stop for live action, legal conclusion, external communication, unneeded personal data, evidence alteration. Failure: blocker and owner. Completion: provenance, confidence, limits, human decisions, approval state, review need. Human review: declaration, acquisition, legal/privacy, public message, closure. Prohibited: declaring, assigning real people, contacting parties, collecting or modifying evidence.
